title: kickxia dealbata
intro: Kickxia dealbata, also known as small bugle or small bugleweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and mucilaginous properties. Kickxia dealbata is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice or applied topically for wound healing.
